rootCause: The start-node requiresItems gate in energy/power-inverter referenced a non-existent placeholder UUID for safety goggles, so runtime gating rendered as 'Unknown item' and blocked quest progression.
resolution: Replaced the invalid UUID with the canonical safety goggles item id, expanded quest validation to fail on unknown item references in rewards/grants/requires fields, and extended quest reward validation tests to include required-item references so CI fails for future invalid quest item ids.
